results.title: Prompt Infection: LLM-to-LLM Prompt Injection within Multi-Agent Systems
results.snippet: LLM Tagging prepends '[AGENT NAME]:' marker to agent responses to indicate the message originates from another agent. Combined with traditional defense mechanisms it provides robust protection.

results.title: A Multi-Agent LLM Defense Pipeline Against Prompt Injection Attacks
results.snippet: Multi-agent LLM defense pipeline evaluating 55 unique prompt injection attacks across 8 categories totaling 400 attack instances; achieves 100% mitigation.
